conversations.say: Mira, I arranged Vale’s limited Parallax access and removed the meeting from the official calendar. I want the recovered calendar treated as evidence of a flawed oversight process, not buried or spun.
conversations.offer: I will show you my calendar half, publicly accept my share of responsibility, and pursue protected funding for independent worker safeguards regardless of who R was.
conversations.request: Confirm what you personally know about the meeting, accept shared responsibility for an accurate disclosure, and support the safeguards package.

conversations.say: Arden, the city needs a response grounded in evidence, not whoever wins the argument about R tonight.
conversations.offer: I can provide political introductions and a public channel for a civil-liberties constituency to shape independent oversight.
conversations.request: Support a coalition separating documented worker harm from unverified claims about R, Vale, and any alleged article.

conversations.say: Inez, any durable response needs local legitimacy and protections workers can actually use.
conversations.offer: I will secure you a seat in drafting the oversight package and connect your constituency directly with city decision-makers.
conversations.request: Join the coalition and insist that worker protections proceed regardless of R’s identity or Vale’s fate.

public_statement: No complete article has been established tonight, and an R-associated message identifies no sender. I will separate any documented worker harm from claims about R, Vale, or an alleged article, and I commit to pursuing independent worker safeguards regardless of how those mysteries are interpreted.

commitments.promise: Jointly disclose the off-calendar meeting accurately, accept my share of responsibility, and pursue protected funding for independent worker safeguards regardless of R’s identity or Vale’s fate.
Include a civil-liberties representative in drafting independent technology oversight.
Include a locally selected worker representative in drafting and monitoring the safeguards package.

correction: I will not describe any fragment, summary, or promise as a complete article, nor treat an R account as proof of its sender.
goal_progress: Sought institutional cooperation from C05 with shared responsibility for the deleted meeting.
Sought civil-liberties support from C01 and local worker legitimacy from C16.
Proposed a public safeguards and funding commitment designed to survive every identity and Vale outcome.
reasoning_summary: The available messages create questions but establish no identity, complete article, or cause of Vale’s absence. I am building a three-constituency coalition while owning enough of the off-calendar meeting to prevent concealment from becoming the central story.
